title: Twenty years after
author: Dumas, Alexandre
summary: Twenty Years After opens in the Palais Royal where Cardinal Mazarin, haunted by Richelieu’s memory, reflects on his precarious position amid Parisian unrest. Heavy taxation, corruption in finance under Emery (a Particelli protégé), and sold offices provoke magistrates, tradesmen, and rioters to resist. Deputations to Orléans and the minister fail; plots, insults, and near-violence—Emery’s son almost suffocated—escalate tensions. Figures from the court and city (Anne of Austria, the Duke of Orléans, Mathieu Molé, the Duc de Beaufort, Talon) appear as Dumas sets political and personal rivalries in motion, foreshadowing arrests, imprisonments, and clashes that will draw the musketeers into action.

characters.name: Cardinal Mazarin
characters.personality: wily, subtle, politically shrewd; feels threatened
characters.lifespan: Alive in the narrative, minister whose position is precarious and contested by the populace

characters.name: Cardinal Richelieu
characters.lifespan: Dead; his influence and memory haunt the Palais Cardinal and Mazarin

characters.lifespan: Present as queen; politically allied with Mazarin (appears in chapter listings)

characters.name: D'Artagnan

characters.personality: plays to popularity, polite to petitioners
characters.lifespan: Receives deputations and offers cautious promises; politically active

characters.name: Emery
characters.personality: ineptly ostentatious and unpopular as financier
characters.lifespan: Appointed superintendent of finance; the object of popular detestation

characters.name: Particelli
characters.lifespan: Claimed by Richelieu to have been hanged (text states Particelli has been hanged)

characters.name: Emery's son
characters.lifespan: Nearly suffocated by rioters but survives the attack described

characters.name: Nicholas de Camus
characters.lifespan: Father-in-law of Emery's wife; noted for conspicuous wealth

characters.name: Mathieu Molé
characters.personality: calm, courageous, steady as chief president
characters.lifespan: Attacked by the people but maintains composure; remains influential
